pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: intro.html
  standalone: true
  toc: true
  number-sections: true
  title-prefix: Epidemiology with R
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  toc-depth: 3
  number-offset:
    - 2
  variables: {}
  
metadata
  crossref:
    chapters: true
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  bibliography:
    - references.bib
  citation: true
  knitr:
    opts_chunk:
      comment: '#>'
      fig.align: center
      out.width: 85%
      dpi: 300
  theme:
    light:
      - cosmo
      - brand
    dark:
      - darkly
      - brand
  mainfont: Source Sans Pro
  monofont: Fira Code
  fontsize: 1.1em
  linestretch: 1.7
  toc-title: On this page
  number-depth: 3
  smooth-scroll: true
  callout-appearance: simple
  fig-cap-location: bottom
  tbl-cap-location: top
  hide-description: true
  title: "[2]{.chapter-number}\_ [Introduction]{.chapter-title}"
